ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "purchase_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase address */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment for the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_amount" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_purchase_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer account is active */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer for loyalty rewards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Billing, Shipping) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the status entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the status entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of payment card used */,
  "card_last4" TEXT /* Last four digits of the payment card */,
  "card_exp_month" TEXT /* Expiration month of the payment card */,
  "card_exp_year" TEXT /* Expiration year of the payment card */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was sent */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL for tracking the shipment */,
  "shipped_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who shipped the order */,
  "delivered_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who marked the order as delivered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_reason_detail" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the return */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was requested */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was unhelpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was restocked */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger restocking */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "alert_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for stock alerts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
